Name: Dying
Notes & Tips: See the Wiki Page for a list of items that give negative HP Regeneration.

Name: Agriculture
Notes & Tips: Can happen on all characters, but Pacifist or Entrepreneur are good candidates. If you see an early Crown or Tractor, that run has a good shot of reaching 200+ Harvesting.

Name: Hoarder
Notes & Tips: Easiest with Saver, who likes to hold on to Materials.

Name: Builder
Challenge: Get 5 turrets on the map simultaneously

Name: Perfect Vision
Notes & Tips: Ranger has an advantage here. They have +50 Range and are tagged for Range Items.

Name: Fireworks
Challenge: Kill 15 enemies with a single explosion
Notes & Tips: Easiest with Bull, who regularly emits a single explosion

Name: Recycling
Notes & Tips: This one rarely happens naturally. You can either make a dummy run where you just buy 12 weapons, sell them, and then lose the run. Or you can buy cheap tier 1 weapons over the duration of a regular run. Entrepreneur can be quite good at this, since you have to spend all your money, and you get more money back from recycling.

Name: Slow
Notes & Tips: Playing Old gives you the first -10%. Then you can use the Blunt Weapon set to get more. Otherwise just buy items with negative Speed. The Page got a list of items with negative speed.

Name: Hungry
Challenge: Pick up 20 consumables during a run

Name: Advanced Technology
Challenge: Reach 10 Ranged Damage and get 3 structures  at the same time

Name: Giant Slayer
Challenge: Kill a boss or an elite in less than 15 seconds
Notes & Tips: This one can be a bit tricky. Look for characters that can deal amazing damage with ranged builds. Loud or Soldier can deal a ton of damage to elites. Try a ranged build that deals a lot of single target damage like for example a build using SMG or Revolver.

Name: Forest
Challenge: Finish a wave with 10 or more living trees
Notes & Tips: This one doesn't happen naturally. The only easy way to get it is by playing Explorer for some waves until the wave duration is long enough. Then play through a wave destroying as few trees as possible.

Name: Bourgeoisie
Challenge: Get 3 tier IV weapons at once

Name: Scavenger
Challenge: Get 10 different tier I items during a run
Notes & Tips: The 10 different items must be Items and not Weapons. Sometimes "items" refers to both, but not here.

Name: Fast Learner
Notes & Tips: Play a few waves as Mutant

Name: Experimentation
Notes & Tips: You can play a game with Gladiator, or it can be done in the first shop with Arms Dealer

Name: Magic and Machinery
Challenge: Reach 10 Elemental Damage and get 3 structures at the same time
Notes & Tips: Can be done with any elemental build by just buying some Structures. An engineering build on Apprentice gets it automatically as you level up.

Name: Blood Drinker
Notes & Tips: Easiest way is to play as Sick and buy all Lifesteal you see in the shop.
